one_time_description: 2020 Greenstone Gold Mine execution payment - one time per capita distribution of $1,000 to members (minors' portions held by First Nation)
economic_notes: Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership distributions of $693,188 received. Investments in Landmark Inn Limited Partnership, Ne-Daa-Kii-Me-Naan Inc., Agoke Development LP, Ginoogam Development Corporation, Ginoogam Development LP, Kenogamisis Energy GP Corporation, Kenogamisis Energy LP, Minodahmun Development LP. COVID-19 impacted service delivery with additional funding received for wages and health and safety costs.
notes: Audit is qualified on two bases: (1) inability to verify investments in various entities and (2) no consolidated budget prepared. Five subsidiaries consolidated (all inactive): 1648973 Ontario Inc., 1670719 Ontario Inc., 1796651 Ontario Inc., Aroland Education Authority, Aroland Industrial LP. 15 CMHC-mortgaged housing units (7 under Housing Loan #1, 8 under Housing Loan #2). Obligation under capital lease of $110,605 for school bus also included in debt. Annual debt service includes $278,694 LTD repayment and $56,141 capital lease repayment. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. OSR calculated as total revenue $11,055,734 minus total government transfers $9,109,402 = $1,946,332. Fiscal year is 2021, not 2024 as template default.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
